---
title: "Onboarding Complete!"
format: html
---

Welcome to the RWAA SA Family! You've completed all onboarding steps. We're thrilled you're here!

```{=html}

<div style="text-align: center; margin: 2rem 0;">
  <div style="display: inline-block; position: relative;">
    <img id="partyGif" src="./img/gif_office_celebration.gif" 
         alt="Office Party Celebration" 
         style="width: 100%; border-radius: 15px; display: block;">
    <div style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">
      <button onclick="toggleGif()" id="gifBtn"
              style="padding: 0.4rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 10px; border: none; 
                     background-color: #C03B2B; color: white; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem;">
        Pause GIF
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  let gifPaused = false;
  const gifSrc = "./img/gif_office_celebration.gif";

  function toggleGif() {
    const img = document.getElementById('partyGif');
    const btn = document.getElementById('gifBtn');
    if (!gifPaused) {
      img.src = "";
      btn.textContent = "Play GIF";
      btn.style.backgroundColor = "#2ECC71";
      gifPaused = true;
    } else {
      img.src = gifSrc;
      btn.textContent = "Pause GIF";
      btn.style.backgroundColor = "#C03B2B";
      gifPaused = false;
    }
  }
</script>

```


### **Your Progress Tracker**

The following in an interactive list to help you track your understanding progress. Thus far, you should:

- [x] Have your Lilly Email works and know how it works.
- [ ] Know difference between Full-Time Employees and Contractors.
- [ ] Know "Who's Who" within SDnA, what they do, and how to contact them.
- [ ] Understand structure and abilities of the RWAA Team.
- [ ] Completed all on boarding steps. 
- [ ] Have access, or waiting on access, to all general tools.

### What's Next?

- 🧬 Review the **Therapeutic Area** pages for the operations and scope of each Therapeutic Area.
- 🔬 Read the **Functional Group** pages to understand the different business needs for each area.
- 🧭 Visit the **Teams** pages to learn about the projects, priorities, and workflows across all groups.
- 📊 Explore the **Analytical Tools** available to you.
- 🗂️ Learn how to use the **Administrative Tools** critical to your role.

::: {.callout-tip}
**Tip:** Bookmark this site! It will continue to be updated with new resources, tools, and guidance as the team grows.
:::

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <p style="font-size: 1.1rem;"><em>Want more confetti? We won't judge.</em></p>
  <button onclick="launchConfetti()" 
          style="font-size: 1.2rem; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 20px; border: none;
                 background-color: #AD1457; color: white; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold;">
    🎊 MORE CONFETTI!
  </button>
</div>

```{=html}

<canvas id="confetti-canvas" style="position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; pointer-events:none; z-index:9999;"></canvas>

<script>
function launchConfetti() {
  const existing = document.getElementById('confetti-canvas');
  if (existing) existing.remove();

  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  canvas.id = 'confetti-canvas';
  canvas.style = 'position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; pointer-events:none; z-index:9999;';
  document.body.appendChild(canvas);

  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  canvas.height = window.innerHeight;

  const confetti = Array.from({length: 150}, () => ({
    x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
    y: Math.random() * -canvas.height,
    w: Math.random() * 10 + 5,
    h: Math.random() * 5 + 3,
    color: ['#D4A017','#C03B2B','#4A90D9','#2ECC71','#9B59B6','#E67E22'][Math.floor(Math.random()*6)],
    speed: Math.random() * 3 + 2,
    angle: Math.random() * 360,
    spin: Math.random() * 4 - 2,
    drift: Math.random() * 2 - 1
  }));

  let frameCount = 0;

  function draw() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    confetti.forEach(c => {
      ctx.save();
      ctx.translate(c.x, c.y);
      ctx.rotate(c.angle * Math.PI / 180);
      ctx.fillStyle = c.color;
      ctx.fillRect(-c.w/2, -c.h/2, c.w, c.h);
      ctx.restore();
      c.y += c.speed;
      c.x += c.drift;
      c.angle += c.spin;
      if (c.y > canvas.height) {
        c.y = -10;
        c.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
      }
    });
    frameCount++;
    if (frameCount < 300) {
      requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    } else {
      function drain() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        let remaining = 0;
        confetti.forEach(c => {
          if (c.y < canvas.height) {
            remaining++;
            ctx.save();
            ctx.translate(c.x, c.y);
            ctx.rotate(c.angle * Math.PI / 180);
            ctx.fillStyle = c.color;
            ctx.fillRect(-c.w/2, -c.h/2, c.w, c.h);
            ctx.restore();
            c.y += c.speed;
            c.x += c.drift;
            c.angle += c.spin;
          }
        });
        if (remaining > 0) {
          requestAnimationFrame(drain);
        } else {
          canvas.remove();
        }
      }
      drain();
    }
  }

  draw();
}

// Auto-launch on page load
launchConfetti();
</script>

```
